infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Wem uses your location to match you with nearby drivers and show your position on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Wem uses your location during rides to monitor your route and ensure your safety.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Wem uses your microphone for the driver voice SOS feature.
